# GitHub Repository Setup

## Repository Description (for GitHub About section)

```
Generate local Mattermost reproduction environments from customer support packages. Safe by default — never reuses production credentials.
```

## Topics / Tags

```
mattermost, support-tools, docker-compose, developer-tools, debugging, go, docker,
mattermost-plugin, ldap, opensearch, infrastructure, devtools
```

## Repository Settings

- **Visibility**: Public
- **Issues**: Enabled
- **Discussions**: Enabled (for community Q&A)
- **Wiki**: Disabled (use docs/ instead)
- **Projects**: Optional
